meta.scope: Defines the formal workflow states and transition rules for teacher-side task authoring, source intake, promotion, and holdout refresh. Machine-readable contract — tests enforce it.

task_lifecycle_states.label: Draft
task_lifecycle_states.description: Teacher has started authoring a task packet from the template. Placeholders may remain.
exit_conditions: All required fields populated (no REPLACE-ME placeholders)

task_lifecycle_states.label: Source Intake Recorded
task_lifecycle_states.description: A source record exists linking this task to a spec acceptance test or external source.
entry_conditions: Source record created in source-records file
exit_conditions: Source record status is promotable_public_seed_source or blocked_teacher_only_holdout

task_lifecycle_states.label: Promoted to Public Seed
task_lifecycle_states.description: A promotion record exists. The task packet is ready to enter the public seed registry.
entry_conditions: Matching source record exists and is promotable
Promotion record created with source_record_id pointing to real source record
teacher_only_inputs_used is false for public tasks
exit_conditions: Task packet added to public seed registry

task_lifecycle_states.label: Public Seed Defined
task_lifecycle_states.description: Task packet is in the public seed registry, student-visible, with frozen evaluation contract reference.
entry_conditions: Task packet validates against JSON schema
rubric_ref points at canonical evaluation contract

task_lifecycle_states.label: Executed
task_lifecycle_states.description: A candidate run has been captured in an isolated workspace with real code/test execution.
entry_conditions: Baseline run exists as first-class object
Candidate run recorded with exit codes and changed files
exit_conditions: Full receipts captured (transcript, changed-files, checks, scorecard, provenance)
task_lifecycle_states.implementation_status: future — run object schema defined, runtime not yet live

task_lifecycle_states.label: Scored
task_lifecycle_states.description: Teacher has reviewed the run and scored it against the frozen evaluation contract.
task_lifecycle_states.implementation_status: future — scorecard schema defined, teacher review console not yet live

valid_transitions.trigger: Teacher creates source record for the task
Teacher creates promotion record after confirming source is promotable
Task packet added to public seed registry
Candidate run completed in isolated workspace
Teacher scores run against evaluation contract
Failure fed back into curriculum — task remains in registry for next attempt

every_promoted_task_must_have: source_record_id pointing to a real source record
promotion_record_id pointing to a real promotion record
teacher_only_inputs_used explicitly set to false for public tasks
public_safe_note explaining why the task is safe for student visibility

holdout_refresh_rules.description: Weekly holdout refresh is a local-only teacher operation. The refresh receipt schema is tracked; the actual holdout content is not.
refresh_expectations: Teacher reviews existing holdout episodes for staleness
Teacher archives or retires episodes that have leaked or become stale
Teacher authors fresh replacement episodes if needed
Teacher runs holdout_author.py audit to confirm no leaks
Teacher generates a refresh receipt recording what changed
holdout_refresh_rules.honesty_note: Refresh receipts confirm the teacher did the work. They do not contain holdout content and are safe to track if desired, but by default stay local.

implemented: Task lifecycle states draft through seed_defined
Public seed registry with 20 validated task packets
Evaluation contract with frozen dimensions and thresholds
future: Promotion gating based on holdout scores
